description: homeowners insurance policy declarations page with coverage limits and policy details

namedInsured.description: the named insured / policyholder name exactly as printed.

policyForm.description: the policy form code only, without the descriptive suffix (e.g. HO-3).

inceptionDate.description: the policy inception/effective date in YYYY-MM-DD format.

expirationDate.description: the policy expiration date in YYYY-MM-DD format.

deductible.description: the policy deductible amount, numeric only.

policyPremium.description: the total policy premium, numeric only.

yearBuilt.description: the year the insured dwelling was built.

construction.description: the dwelling construction type as printed.

propertyAddress.description: the insured property address on one line as printed.

agentName.description: the agent or agency contact name.

coverages.description: each coverage line from the declarations with its limit. include both the property coverages (dwelling, other structures, personal property, loss of use) and the liability coverages (liability, medical).

coverageType.description: the coverage name only, without the section-letter prefix (e.g. 'Dwelling' not '(A) Dwelling').

limit.description: the coverage limit amount, numeric only.

basis.description: the basis qualifier printed next to the limit if any, else null (e.g. 'Each Occurrence', 'Each Person').
